<!-- # manuscript/tables/_tbl-01-example.qmd ----
     Include partial, not a page - leading underscore keeps Quarto's
     website-project renderer from also rendering this as its own site
     page (same convention as _quarto.yml/_freeze/_targets). Kept
     deliberately thin: the actual table lives in tbl-01-example.R via
     the pipeline; this file's only job is pulling that target's value
     into wherever {{< include >}} places it. Needs its own library(flextable)
     call - confirmed by direct testing that without it, the object prints
     as a dumped internal structure instead of an actual table, since the
     package that owns the print method isn't guaranteed loaded in this
     render session just because it built the object upstream. -->

```{r}
#| label: tbl-01-example
#| tbl-cap: "Example table generated from the pipeline."
library(flextable)
targets::tar_read(tbl_01_example, store = here::here("_targets"))
```
